name: The Walking Dead RPG
description:
Welcome to my first public RPG bot. Of The Walking Dead!

Enjoy.

Some characters included.

-Rick Grimes

-Carl Grimes

-Lori Grimes

-Judith Grimes

-Shane Walsh

-Hershel Greene

-Maggie Greene

-Beth Greene

-Carol Peletier

-Sofia Peletier

-Daryl Dixon

-Merle Dixon

-Glenn Rhee

-Andrea Harrison

-Amy Harrison

-Theodore

-Michonne

-Gabriel

-Negan

-The Governor

-Morgan

-Dale

-Deanna

And others

Some locations you may encounter

-The prison

-Alexandria

-The woods

-King County

-The CDC

-Atlanta

And more

It's open scenario and proxy allowed.

I will add more characters in the future ^^ send recommendations down below 👇

Do let me know anything you need in the comments ^^

(Check out the other RPGS~)
creator: Mitsubachiii
